params.qin: (("Mimih" OR "Mimi spirits") AND ("Northern Territory" OR Arnhem OR Australia)) AND mediatype:texts
params.query: (((text:Mimih OR text:Mimih OR text__reviews:Mimih) OR (text:"Mimi spirits" OR text:"Mimi spirits" OR text__reviews:"Mimi spirits")) AND ((text:"Northern Territory" OR text:"Northern Territory" OR text__reviews:"Northern Territory") OR (text:Arnhem OR text:Arnhem OR text__reviews:Arnhem) OR (text:Australia OR text:Australia OR text__reviews:Australia))) AND mediatype:texts
